claims.claim: Israel's National Health Insurance Law (Chok Bituach Briut Mamlachti) enacted 1995 mandates universal coverage through four HMOs
Approximate HMO memberships 2026: Clalit ~4.8M (52%), Maccabi ~2.6M (27%), Meuhedet ~1.3M (14%), Leumit ~1.0M (9%)
HMO switching: up to twice per 12 months, 6 fixed effective dates per year (Jan 1, Mar 1, May 1, Jul 1, Sep 1, Nov 1), apply by 15th of preceding two months
Supplementary tier names: Clalit Mushlam / Mushlam Platinum; Maccabi Zahav (entry) / Sheli (premium); Meuhedet Adif / Adif C; Leumit Silver / Gold
claims.raw_snippet: Mushlam, Zahav, Sheli, Adif, Silver, Gold

claims.claim: Sal Briut (health basket) 2026 NIS 650M budget; priorities: cancer therapies, expanded mental health drug coverage, PGT for BRCA1/BRCA2 carriers
MyHealth (Marpe) is the Israeli Ministry of Health national patient portal, a cross-HMO read-only health record viewer that complements but does not replace HMO apps
Netziv Kvilanot HaTzibur (Ministry of Health Ombudsman) handles complaints not resolved by HMO patient advocate
Kol Zchut HMO switching rules reference (EN and HE versions)
Kol Zchut HMO switching Hebrew reference

Standard HMO copayments (basic basket) approximate ranges 2026: primary care visit 0 ש"ח / 0 NIS, specialist visit 20-30 ש"ח / 30 NIS, ER 100-160 ש"ח / 100 NIS / 160 NIS (waived if admitted), prescription generic 10-15 ש"ח / 15 NIS, prescription brand 15-50 ש"ח / 50 NIS, blood tests 0 ש"ח, MRI/CT 0-50 ש"ח / 50 NIS, physiotherapy 20-30 ש"ח / 30 NIS, mental health session 0-30 ש"ח / 30 NIS
claims.raw_snippet: השתתפות עצמית: 0 ש"ח (רופא משפחה / בדיקות דם), 30 ש"ח (מומחה / פיזיותרפיה / בריאות הנפש), 100 ש"ח (מיון), 160 ש"ח (מיון בקצה), 15 ש"ח (תרופה גנרית), 50 ש"ח (תרופה ייחודית / MRI/CT). Equivalent NIS values: 0 NIS, 15 NIS, 30 NIS, 50 NIS, 100 NIS, 160 NIS.

claims.claim: Supplementary insurance monthly pricing 2026: Level 1 (basic upgrade) approximately 30-80 ש"ח / 80 NIS per person scaling with age; Level 2 (premium) approximately 80-200 ש"ח / 200 NIS per person scaling with age
claims.raw_snippet: ביטוח משלים: 30-80 ש"ח רמה 1 (80 NIS), 80-200 ש"ח רמה 2 (200 NIS) לאדם, משתנה לפי גיל

claims.claim: Nefesh B'Nefesh kupat cholim guide for olim
